howItWorks.intro: This rv generator sizing calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Generator Size
rules.formula: Size = Σ Starting Watts of all appliances
rules.explanation: Sum all appliance starting watts and round up to next generator size.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: What size generator for an RV?
faq.a: 2000-3000W for small RVs, 3500-5500W for most Class C/A with AC.
Inverter generators are quieter and produce cleaner power for electronics.
